name: list_products
description: List all products in the inventory. Returns product IDs, names, quantities, and other details for every product.

name: check_inventory
description: Check inventory details for a specific product including quantity, location, and status.

product_id.description: The unique identifier of the product to check inventory for.

name: update_inventory
description: Update the inventory quantity for a specific product using set, add, or subtract operations.

product_id.description: The unique identifier of the product to update.

quantity.description: The quantity value to set, add, or subtract.

operation.description: The inventory operation to perform: set, add, or subtract. Defaults to set if not specified.
